languages.text: "Не просто мало, а прискорбно недостаточно, мон-кай. Я хочу, чтобы твой сородич прочувствовал всю глубину того, насколько он ничтожен — и хочу увидеть это своими глазами".
"It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."
languages.original_text: "Не просто мало, а прискорбно недостаточно, мон-кай. Я хочу, чтобы твой сородич прочувствовал всю глубину того, насколько он ничтожен — и хочу увидеть это своими глазами".

"It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."

languages.text: "Es ist mehr als nur 'nicht genug'. Es ist empörend unangemessen, Chem-Pan-Sey. Ich will, dass Euer Lakai die wahre Tiefe seiner Wertlosigkeit erkennt ... und ich will es mit eigenen Augen sehen."
languages.original_text: "It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist mehr als nur 'nicht genug'. Es ist empörend unangemessen, Chem-Pan-Sey. Ich will, dass Euer Lakai die wahre Tiefe seiner Wertlosigkeit erkennt ... und ich will es mit eigenen Augen sehen."

languages.text: « Je n'attends pas quelque chose de "suffisant". Tout ceci est en deçà de mes attentes, mon-keigh. Je veux que votre compagnon mesure enfin pleinement l'étendue de sa nullité, sous mes yeux. »
languages.original_text: "It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'attends pas quelque chose de "suffisant". » Tout ceci est en deçà de mes attentes, mon-keigh. Je veux que votre compagnon mesure enfin pleinement l'étendue de sa nullité, sous mes yeux. »

languages.text: «No es que no me baste, es que es completamente inadecuado, mon-keigh. Quiero que tu congénere capte la verdadera magnitud de su inutilidad y quiero ser testigo de ello».
languages.original_text: "It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."

traits.locale_text: «No es que no me baste, es que es completamente inadecuado, mon-keigh. Quiero que tu congénere capte la verdadera magnitud de su inutilidad y quiero ser testigo de ello».

languages.text: "Mesele 'yetmez mi' meselesi değil. Özrü acınası derecede yetersiz. Akrabanın değersizliğinin gerçek derinliğini kavramasını istiyorum, bunu bizzat görmek istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."

traits.locale_text: "Mesele 'yetmez mi' meselesi değil. Özrü acınası derecede yetersiz. Akrabanın değersizliğinin gerçek derinliğini kavramasını istiyorum, bunu bizzat görmek istiyorum."

languages.text: “岂止是‘不够’，简直差得太远了，猴子。我要让你这个同胞彻底认清自己是多么一文不值，而且我要亲眼见证这一点。”
languages.original_text: "It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."

traits.locale_text: “岂止是‘不够’，简直差得太远了，猴子。我要让你这个同胞彻底认清自己是多么一文不值，而且我要亲眼见证这一点。”

languages.text: 「単に『足りない』どころの話ではない。嘆かわしいほど不十分だ、モンケイ。私は貴様の同胞に、自らの無価値さの真の深さを思い知らせたいのだ。そして、それをこの目で直に見届けたい」
languages.original_text: "It is more than just 'not enough.' It is woefully inadequate, mon-keigh. I want your kinsman to grasp the true depth of his worthlessness and I wish to behold it first-hand."

traits.locale_text: 「単に『足りない』どころの話ではない。嘆かわしいほど不十分だ、モンケイ。私は貴様の同胞に、自らの無価値さの真の深さを思い知らせたいのだ。そして、それをこの目で直に見届けたい」
